ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "security" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "cik" INTEGER /* Central Index Key (CIK) assigned by the SEC */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "cfo" TEXT /* Name of the CFO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the company's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sec_filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that made the filing */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of SEC filing (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K) */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the filing was made */,
  "report" TEXT /* URL or path to the filing report */,
  "filing_status" TEXT /* Status of the filing (e.g., filed, amended) */,
  "filing_version" INTEGER /* Version of the filing */,
  "filing_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the filing content */,
  "filing_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the filing (e.g., Q1, Q2, annual) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the filing (e.g., SEC, company website) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sec_filings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gics" (
  "gics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GICS entry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* GICS sector (e.g., Industrials, Health Care) */,
  "sub_industry" TEXT /* GICS sub-industry (e.g., Industrial Conglomerates, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the GICS sector */,
  "sub_industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the GICS sub-industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_gics" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "gics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GICS sector/sub-industry */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the GICS classification became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the GICS classification ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "gics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue for the fiscal year */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit for the fiscal year */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income for the fiscal year */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* EBITDA (Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization) for the fiscal year */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets for the fiscal year */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities for the fiscal year */,
  "equity" REAL /* Shareholder equity for the fiscal year */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow for the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_period" TEXT /* Fiscal period (e.g., Q1, Q2, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* The specific permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* The resource the permission applies to (e.g., companies, sec_filings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission", "resource")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* The version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* The date and time the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* A description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_versions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* The name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* A description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
